name: com.spaccle.app
description: Spaccle — modern laundry pickup & delivery app

scripts.dev: cordova prepare browser && concurrently --names "SYNC,SERVER" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "chokidar 'www/**/*' -c 'cordova prepare browser'" "live-server platforms/browser/www --port=3000 --no-browser --quiet"

author: Apache Cordova Team
